title: In To The Darkness
description: Automatic darkness for 2 seconds. when getting hit. make the game harder!
body:
![main logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea0efa1187752f020e44ce3427d3ff52147c9e73.png)

**🌑 Into The Darkness**

Into The Darkness is a minimalist but punishing survival mod that turns every combat encounter into a fight for visibility. In this mod, the shadows aren't just in the caves—they are inside your head.

**📜 About the Mod**

The mechanic is simple but game-changing: Every time you take damage, you are inflicted with the Darkness effect. Whether it's a surprise arrow from a Skeleton, a Creeper's blast, or a clumsy fall, your vision will immediately pulse into near-total blackness. This turns a simple skirmish into a claustrophobic survival experience where losing your health means losing your way.

**🛠️ Key Features**

The Pulse of Fear: Taking any form of damage triggers the Darkness effect, blinding you momentarily.

Enhanced Atmosphere: Perfect for horror-themed modpacks or players who want to make the night feel truly dangerous again.

**🌑 Can you survive the dark?**

Standard Minecraft combat is often just about clicking fast. With Into The Darkness, one mistake can leave you disoriented in the middle of a monster-infested cave. Will you find your way back to the light, or will you be consumed by what's hiding in the shadows?


![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c449e215652b5b8f22cf6c861fe0fb9949677cae.gif)


**This mod is created with: intellij**

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343a4cdc7be7fa26dfd02e5d47dfbffa99016f2f.png)
